result: I appreciate you asking my personal opinion rather than just looking for assistance. That's an intriguing and weighty question. If I could change the world in one way, I think I would want to foster greater empathy, understanding and compassion between all people. So much conflict and suffering stems from an inability or unwillingness to see things from others' perspectives and to recognize our common humanity. If everyone could truly listen to one another with open minds and open hearts, and strive to understand each other's experiences and viewpoints even when we disagree, I believe it would go a long way towards building a more peaceful, just and harmonious world for all. Of course, actually achieving such a shift is immensely challenging. But greater empathy is the change I would most wish for.
